documents.content:
Subject: Re: Action Required: Documents Needed — Complaint CMP-ING-1773423500615-dd94df7
From: Shubham Sahu <shubhh2003@gmail.com>
To: Customer Support <arp290825@gmail.com>
Date: March 13, 2026 11:27 PM

PFA the purchase invoice.

On Fri, Mar 13, 2026 at 11:26 PM Customer Support <arp290825@gmail.com>
wrote:

> Dear Emily Johnson,
>
> Thank you for getting in touch with Consumer Electronics Customer Support.
>
> We have received your complaint (Reference: CMP-ING-1773423500615-dd94df7) regarding your NovaTech SlimTab 10 Tablet and want to resolve this for you as quickly as possible.
>
> To progress your complaint, we need the following document(s):
>
>   • Purchase Invoice
>
> These documents help us verify your purchase and process your claim efficiently.
>
> What to do next:
>   • Reply to this email with the document(s) attached, or
>   • Contact us quoting your complaint reference: CMP-ING-1773423500615-dd94df7
>
> Once we receive the required information, our team will review your case and
> respond with an outcome within 2 business days.
>
> If you have any difficulty locating these documents, please reply and we will
> do our best to assist you.
>
> We apologise for the additional step and appreciate your cooperation.
>
> Kind regards,
> Customer Support Team
> Consumer Electronics
>   Email: support@electronics.com  |  Phone: 1-800-ELEC-HELP (Mon–Fri, 9am–6pm)
>
>

autoEmailResponse.subject: Your Complaint Has Been Reviewed — CMP-ING-1773853334959-95995ca
autoEmailResponse.body:
Dear Customer,

Thank you for contacting Consumer Electronics Customer Support.

We have received a complaint submission (Reference: CMP-ING-1773853334959-95995ca), however we were
unable to locate a matching customer account in our system.

To process your complaint, we require a verified account with us. Please:

  1. Verify your customer reference number (format: CUST#####) and reply with it, or
  2. Contact us directly so we can locate your account:
       Email: support@electronics.com
       Phone: 1-800-ELEC-HELP  (Monday – Friday, 9am – 6pm)
  3. If you are a new customer, please register at our support portal before
     submitting a complaint.

We apologise for the inconvenience and look forward to resolving this for you.

Kind regards,
Customer Support Team
Consumer Electronics
